text.tspan: ClearAI HS-code classification — uniform scrutiny pipeline
The path an item takes through the system
is determined by what is structurally true
about the input, not by what the merchant supplied.
Merchant code is EVIDENCE to be reconciled,
not a routing key that decides scrutiny level.
Lookup the merchant code in hs_codes.
Output: merchant_code_status (a SIGNAL, not a routing key — every status flows into the same Stage 2A below)
every status, regardless of merchant data quality, converges here
STAGE 2A | LLM call (Sonnet) | UNIVERSAL — runs on every item
Hybrid retrieval (pgvector + BM25 + trigram, RRF fused)
Picker SEES: description, value, currency, qty, weight, origin
Returns: top-1 + top-3 alts + confidence + GIR rationale
STAGE 2B | Hint Reconciliation | merchant_code (if present) is now reconciled against blind_result
Five outcomes — each path produces final_code + reconciliation verdict for the trace
Path A — blind agrees with merchant
LLM cost added: 0 Stage 4 still runs.
Path B — same chapter, sibling leaf
ARBITRATE: extra LLM call sees both leaves
LLM cost added: +1 Catches the wrong-leaf-in-right-heading error.
Path C — different chapter (the suspicious one)
INVESTIGATE: extra LLM call sees BOTH codes
LLM cost added: +1 Catches misclassification + fraud signal.
Path D — partial code (6 or 8 digits)
when: merchant_code is a prefix (not 12 digits)
if blind starts with prefix → ACCEPT (no extra call).
else → EXPAND: extra LLM call picks best 12-digit leaf under prefix
with blind_code shown as out-of-prefix candidate.
Path E — no code or unknown code
ACCEPT blind_result as-is. Nothing to reconcile against.
If UNKNOWN: flag merchant_code_invalid in trace.
STAGE 3 | no LLM | pure DB lookup
Apply tenant_overrides — usually no-op; can remap final_code.
STAGE 4 | LLM call (Sonnet) | UNIVERSAL — runs on every item | FRAUD CATCHER
Sanity Check — code + description + value plausibility
• unit price implausibly low for category
but $50 unit price warrants review against
AUDIT TRACE | stored on every batch_items row
LLM CALL BUDGET | distribution per 300-item batch
D. partial, blind out of prefix (expand) 3 2% 18
Average: ~2.2 calls/item Total per 300-item batch: ~651 calls
Wall-clock @ concurrency 8, ~5s blended: ~7 min (with quota upgrade: 2-3 min)
Two LLM calls are GUARANTEED on every item: Stage 2A (blind classify) and Stage 4 (sanity check).
The third LLM call (arbitrate / investigate / expand) is conditional — driven by what's structurally true about the input.
